scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer
scripts.make:mac: npm run prepare:binaries && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --mac --publish never
scripts.make:mac:signed: npm run prepare:binaries && npm run build && OPENTALKING_MAC_NOTARIZE=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --mac --publish never
scripts.make:win: npm run prepare:binaries && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac: npm run prepare:binaries && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --mac --dir --publish never
scripts.package:win: npm run prepare:binaries && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json5 --win --x64 --dir --publish never
